emptySub: You'll see messages and event updates here.

pref.mentionSub: When someone @mentions you in a message or hangout
pref.eventJoinSub: When a new person joins an event you're going to
pref.newEventSub: When someone creates an event in your city
pref.newChallengeSub: When someone launches a challenge in your city
pref.cityJoinSub: When anyone joins the city channel you're in
pref.worldArrivalSub: When a newcomer joins from any city (World channel)
pref.friendSub: When someone sends you a friend request or accepts yours
pref.vibeSub: When someone leaves a vibe on your profile
pref.topicReplySub: When someone replies in a hangout you joined
pref.newTopicSub: When someone starts a new hangout in your city
